verses.1: I will give thanks to the LORD with my whole heart.
verses.2: I will be glad and rejoice in you.
verses.4: For you have maintained my just cause.
verses.6: The enemy is overtaken by endless ruin.
verses.8: He will judge the world in righteousness.
verses.9: The LORD will also be a high tower for the oppressed;
verses.10: Those who know your name will put their trust in you,
verses.11: Sing praises to the LORD, who dwells in Zion,
verses.12: For he who avenges blood remembers them.
verses.14: that I may show all of your praise.
verses.15: The nations have sunk down in the pit that they made.
verses.16: The LORD has made himself known.
verses.17: The wicked shall be turned back to Sheol,
verses.18: For the needy shall not always be forgotten,
verses.19: Arise, LORD! Don’t let man prevail.
